summary: Iteration 131: Cruscotto Finanziario Bug Fix Verification - ALL TESTS PASS. The financial dashboard now correctly integrates both active (invoices) and passive (fatture_ricevute) cycles. Backend API returns all required new fields: flusso_reale (6 months), aging_fornitori, totale_crediti, totale_debiti, fornitori_scaduti, fornitori_scadenza_mese. IVA trimestri now includes fatturato_attivo, fatturato_passivo, n_fatture_emesse, n_fatture_ricevute. Liquidita has new passive cycle fields: pagamenti_effettuati, da_pagare_fornitori, saldo_reale, n_pagamenti. Frontend EBITDAPage correctly displays all new components.

active_passive_integration.description: Financial dashboard now integrates both active (invoices) and passive (fatture_ricevute) cycles

new_fields_in_response.flusso_reale: PASS - Array with 6 months of real cash flow (entrate, uscite, saldo)
new_fields_in_response.aging_fornitori: PASS - Aging buckets for supplier payables (0_30, 30_60, 60_90, over_90)
new_fields_in_response.fornitori_scadenza_mese: PASS - Supplier invoices due this month

financial_service_field_names.description: financial_service.py uses correct field names for fatture_ricevute
financial_service_field_names.data_documento: PASS - Uses ISO string dates for filtering

panoramica_tab.flusso_reale_chart: PASS - 'Flusso di Cassa Reale (6 mesi)' chart found
panoramica_tab.aging_fornitori: PASS - 'Debiti Fornitori (da pagare)' aging buckets - NEW
panoramica_tab.bilancino_iva: PASS - Shows IVA Vendite (Debito) vs IVA Acquisti (Credito)

iva_trimestrale_tab.chart: PASS - IVA quarterly chart with Da Versare, IVA Credito, IVA Debito
iva_trimestrale_tab.quarterly_cards: PASS - All 4 Q1-Q4 cards with F24 deadlines
iva_trimestrale_tab.annual_summary: PASS - Riepilogo Annuale IVA with totals

scadenzario_tab.table: PASS - Scadenzario table with empty state handling

margini_tab.top_margin: PASS - 'Top Commesse per Margine' card with empty state

frontend_tests.year_navigation: PASS - Year selector with prev/next buttons

critical_code_review_comments: financial_service.py correctly uses 'imposta' field (not 'totale_iva') for IVA credit from fatture_ricevute
Date filtering uses 'data_documento' (ISO string) consistently for both active and passive invoices
payment_status field used correctly for both cycles to track paid/unpaid status
All aging calculations use data_scadenza_pagamento for supplier invoices (not data_scadenza)
flusso_reale correctly shows last 6 months of actual cash flow (incassi from paid invoices, uscite from paid fatture_ricevute)
IVA calculation now properly shows both iva_debito (from sales) and iva_credito (from purchases)
seed_data_creation: Test user and session created/cleaned up automatically during test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Financial dashboard (Cruscotto Finanziario) bug fix complete and verified. The endpoint /api/dashboard/cruscotto-finanziario now correctly integrates both active (invoices) and passive (fatture_ricevute) cycles. Key changes: 1) Uses correct field names for fatture_ricevute (imposta, data_scadenza_pagamento, payment_status), 2) Returns new fields (flusso_reale, aging_fornitori, totale_debiti, fornitori_scaduti), 3) IVA calculation shows both debito and credito. Frontend displays all new data correctly including aging bars for both Crediti Clienti AND Debiti Fornitori.
